name: Kwenyia
ai_summary: Kwenyia is an experienced Montessori teacher with childcare background, located in Atlanta, GA. She is energetic and passionate about working with children, seeking full-time or part-time roles.

transcripts.q3: Hi. My name is Maya Jackson. I have currently been working in childcare. I was it was years. My last job was a Montessori teacher at the Suzuki upon City Market. I have worked from ages 6 weeks up until six years old.
transcripts.q4: I've located in Lovejoy, Hampton Georgia and I'm close to like Atlanta Motor, Speedway, McDonough griffing, Stockbridge,
transcripts.q5: I am currently looking for full-time, but right now, with the position that I'm in, I'm willing to accept part-time.
